creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Nut v2.6.1 fails to build due to vulnerability identified in vuxml, http://www.vuxml.org/freebsd/47f13540-c4cb-4971-8dc6-28d0dabfd9cd.html

Fix: Please refer to enclosed patch as a starting point. The patch enables the package to be assembled.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/sysutils/nut && make
